brittany uses 1/4 ounce of shampoo every other day. she needs to calculate the total amount of shampoo she uses in a leap year. a leap year has 366 days, so she uses shampoo 366 / 2 = 183 times. each time she uses 1/4 ounce, so the total amount of shampoo she needs is 183 * 1/4 = 45.75 ounces. she buys shampoo in 14-ounce bottles, so she needs to buy [number] bottles to get enough shampoo. the first bottle will provide 14 ounces, the second will provide another 14 ounces, and the third will provide the remaining 7.5 ounces. she needs [number] bottles to get her through a leap year.
